project_type: Monorepo EDMS (Engineering Document Management System) with React 19 + Vite 7 frontend and Django 5.2 + DRF backend
build_system: pnpm workspace with catalog dependencies. Node 22+ required. Biome for linting/formatting. Backend uses pip with requirements.txt.
test_framework: Vitest with jsdom for frontend (only 1 smoke test file currently). pytest for backend (configured in CI).
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm run build (must pass). 2. Run pnpm run typecheck (check for new errors). 3. Run pnpm run lint:frontend (check error count not increased). 4. Run pnpm run test (all tests pass).
setup_instructions: export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/installs/node/22.22.3/bin:$PATH" && cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && pnpm install && pnpm approve-builds esbuild
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installation. Must use existing pnpm-lock.yaml dependencies. Node 22.22.3 installed via mise. pnpm 11.5.3. No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits enforced. No file >800 lines. Use semantic CSS variables (no hardcoded colors). Import page-level UI from @/components/ui/Shared. Test with both dark/light themes.
key_patterns: Lazy-loaded pages via React.lazy. ProtectedRoute with role arrays. Services in src/services/. Hooks in src/hooks/. Backend uses modular app structure (shared, documents, config_mgmt, work). Standardized API responses (success_response/error_response). Correlation ID middleware. Celery for background tasks.
directory_structure: Root: pnpm workspace. artifacts/edms/: production frontend (React 19 + Vite 7 + Radix UI + TailwindCSS 4). artifacts/api-server/: mock Express API. backend/: Django 5.2 backend with apps (shared, documents, config_mgmt, work, edms_api, integrations, services). lib/: shared packages (api-spec, api-zod, api-client-react). docs/: documentation (adr/, audits/). scripts/: utility scripts.
